{{CargoRelic
|name=Garden of Roses
|class_id=21858
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=When war devours kingdoms, poets sow immortality. Saadi's words blossom into timeless roses - each petal a lesson, each thorn a truth.
|fame=33
|art=30
|fth=22
|civ=46
|tech=23
|ss1=prop@69943_2<br>prop@69943_3
|ss2=prop@69943_2<br>prop@69943_3
|ss3=prop@69943_2<br>prop@69943_3
|ss4=prop@69943_2<br>prop@69943_3
|ss7=Every 10 Parsian maps opened grants Snail ATK +25<br>Parsia Treasure Map Opened: 100/100<br>Snail ATK +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:skill@1124_1_1.png|50px]]Place in Parsian Museum: Relic CIV +5
}}
